name: Sebastiani Ventures Corp.
summary: Sebastiani Ventures Corp. does not have significant operations. It focuses on the identification and evaluation of new business opportunities for the purpose of acquisition or participation. Previously, it was engaged principally in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in North and South America. The company was formerly known as Trident Gold Corp. and changed its name to Sebastiani Ventures Corp. in April 2017. Sebastiani Ventures Corp. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
